# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  # VPC Network - Using CUSTOM mode for security (NOT auto mode)
  # Auto mode creates subnets in all regions with predictable IP ranges,
  # which increases attack surface and violates least-privilege networking.
  - name: three-tier-vpc
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: three-tier-vpc
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false
      routingConfig:
        routingMode: REGIONAL

  # Web Tier Subnet - DMZ/Public-facing
  - name: web-tier-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      name: web-tier-subnet
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
      ipCidrRange: 10.1.0.0/24
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true
      enableFlowLogs: true
      logConfig:
        enable: true
        aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
        flowSampling: 0.5
        metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

  # App Tier Subnet - Internal application layer
  - name: app-tier-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      name: app-tier-subnet
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
      ipCidrRange: 10.2.0.0/24
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true
      enableFlowLogs: true
      logConfig:
        enable: true
        aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
        flowSampling: 0.5
        metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

  # Data Tier Subnet - Database layer (most restricted)
  - name: data-tier-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      name: data-tier-subnet
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
      ipCidrRange: 10.3.0.0/24
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true
      enableFlowLogs: true
      logConfig:
        enable: true
        aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
        flowSampling: 0.5
        metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

  # Deny all ingress by default (defense in depth - GCP has implied deny,
  # but explicit rules provide clarity and override any implied allow rules)
  - name: deny-all-ingress
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: deny-all-ingress
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 65534
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      denied:
        - IPProtocol: all

  # Deny all egress by default (zero-trust approach)
  - name: deny-all-egress
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: deny-all-egress
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 65534
      direction: EGRESS
      destinationRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      denied:
        - IPProtocol: all

  # Allow external HTTPS traffic to web tier only
  - name: allow-https-to-web
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-https-to-web
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      targetTags:
        - web-tier
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "443"

  # Allow web tier to communicate with app tier only
  - name: allow-web-to-app
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-web-to-app
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceTags:
        - web-tier
      targetTags:
        - app-tier
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "8080"

  # Allow app tier to communicate with data tier only
  - name: allow-app-to-data
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-app-to-data
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceTags:
        - app-tier
      targetTags:
        - data-tier
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "5432"

  # Allow egress from web tier to app tier subnet only
  - name: allow-web-egress-to-app
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-web-egress-to-app
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: EGRESS
      destinationRanges:
        - "10.2.0.0/24"
      targetTags:
        - web-tier
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "8080"

  # Allow egress from app tier to data tier subnet only
  - name: allow-app-egress-to-data
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-app-egress-to-data
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: EGRESS
      destinationRanges:
        - "10.3.0.0/24"
      targetTags:
        - app-tier
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "5432"

  # Allow egress to Google APIs via Private Google Access
  - name: allow-egress-google-apis
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: allow-egress-google-apis
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      priority: 900
      direction: EGRESS
      destinationRanges:
        - "199.36.153.8/30"
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "443"

  # Cloud Router for NAT (web tier may need controlled outbound access)
  - name: three-tier-router
    type: compute.v1.router
    properties:
      name: three-tier-router
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
      nats:
        - name: three-tier-nat
          natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
          sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: LIST_OF_SUBNETWORKS
          subnetworks:
            - name: $(ref.web-tier-subnet.selfLink)
              sourceIpRangesToNat:
                - ALL_IP_RANGES
          logConfig:
            enable: true
            filter: ALL

outputs:
  - name: vpcSelfLink
    value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
  - name: webSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.web-tier-subnet.selfLink)
  - name: appSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.app-tier-subnet.selfLink)
  - name: dataSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.data-tier-subnet.selfLink)
